title: Bridge Essay: Neurobiological and genetic correlates of the dissociative subtype of posttrauma

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.

**Neurobiological and genetic correlates of the dissociative subtype of posttraumatic stress disorder.** — J Psychopathol Clin Sci. PMID: 37023279. DOI: 10.1037/abn0000795. Approximately 10%-30% of individuals with posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD) exhibit adissociative subtype of the condition defined by symptoms of depersonalization and derealization. This study examined the psychometric evidence for the dissociative subtype of PTSD in asample of young, primarily male post-9/11-era Veterans (n = 374 at baseline and n = 163 at follow-up) and evaluated its biological correlates with respect to resting state functional connectivity (default mode network [DMN];...

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 7 (Emptiness). Evaluation: Excellent (score=3.5)
